data.content: Shipment review approved: origin/main is at merge commit b3c4695e0d40 with implementation commit 33681cfa7a27 tagged on the knot; main contains the full beat ID header plus alias propagation/display code and covering tests; no invariants were defined; GitHub Actions runs 22893998660 (CI), 22893998647 (Coverage Badge), and 22893998646 (Changesets) all completed successfully for b3c4695e0d40d0cd09b8f75e0ff001efa756c39a, with no dependent-system regressions evident from the shipped diff and green pipeline.
